scenarios.label: North Carolina trout, clear tailwater winter control day

expectation.seasonal_story: Clear winter tailwater trout should stay lower-column and subtle with sculpin, bugger, leech, and disciplined jerkbait / hair lanes.

top_1_lure.why: Hair Jig / Marabou Jig fits a active fish mood, stays in the mid lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

top_3_lures.why: Hair Jig / Marabou Jig fits a active fish mood, stays in the mid lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Suspending Jerkbait fits a active fish mood, stays in the mid lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Paddle-Tail Swimbait fits a active fish mood, stays in the mid lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

top_1_fly.why: Woolly Bugger fits a active fish mood, stays in the mid lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

top_3_flies.why: Woolly Bugger fits a active fish mood, stays in the mid lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Rabbit-Strip Leech fits a active fish mood, stays in the mid lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Conehead Bugger / Streamer fits a active fish mood, stays in the mid lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

color_notes: Hair Jig / Marabou Jig: Theme: dark contrast. Try black, brown/black, black/purple.
Suspending Jerkbait: Theme: natural baitfish. Try ghost minnow, pro blue, olive shad.
Paddle-Tail Swimbait: Theme: natural baitfish. Try olive/white, shad, smoke shad.
Woolly Bugger: Theme: dark contrast. Try black, black/olive, black/purple.
Rabbit-Strip Leech: Theme: dark contrast. Try black, black/purple, black/blue.
Conehead Bugger / Streamer: Theme: dark contrast. Try black, black/blue, black/purple.
daily_profile_notes: Variables considered: temperature_condition, pressure_regime, wind_condition, light_cloud_condition, runoff_flow_disruption
